query:
SELECT s.id, s.jobId, s.sceneIndex, s.mvSceneStatus, s.videoUrl, s.errorMessage, s.updatedAt, s.taskId
FROM musicVideoScenes s
JOIN musicVideoJobs j ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.createdAt > (NOW() - INTERVAL 4 HOUR)
ORDER BY j.createdAt DESC, s.sceneIndex ASC
LIMIT 20;
command:
